name: Shopify store owners processing 10–50 orders/month tool
description: For Shopify store owners processing 10–50 orders/month, poor retention insights cause missed renewal opportunities. We provide automated health reports instead of manual tracking.
problem_solved: Inability to accurately measure customer retention and forecast renewal rates.

locked_fields.current_alternative: Manual tracking of customer interactions and sales data.
